allowed_work: compare hypotheses against future certified evidence
forbidden_work: blend experiment evidence into normal scores
delete gates without a shadow-test replacement
agent_brief.hard_rule: Do not change bot config, route policy, registry phase, score weights, or gates directly.

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Retire if runner opportunity lost exceeds protected drawdown after 30 closed trades.
hypotheses.mechanism: Early auction edges decay when first-hour trend fails, while true runners should keep making higher lows or hold above VWAP/opening range.
hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
hypotheses.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL only; never modify live exits without exit-intent trace proof.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Shadow-grade an exit overlay that banks partial gains after first-hour failure, but leaves a runner only when opening-range/VWAP structure remains intact.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: The bot often gives back early gains; a session-aware exit rule may preserve small daily wins without killing true runners.
hypotheses.title: Morning profit decay guard

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Retire or tighten if 20 shadow picks produce avg ghost R <= 0, or if top-channel collisions outperform lower-location picks.
hypotheses.mechanism: Auction location creates asymmetric inventory: lower-rail buyers can reload against nearby invalidation while overhead gap supply is still far enough away to offer a clean reward path.
hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
hypotheses.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL -> BOT_CANDIDATE only after 3 separate days and at least 20 clean ghost picks.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Emit a shadow pick only when channel_percentile <= 35, room_to_gap_above_r >= 1.5, nearest_gap_above_distance_pct is not immediate, and nearest_gap_below or lower rail defines a tight invalidation.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: Longs work better when price is near the lower channel rail with clean room to the next overhead gap, and fail more often when entry is already near the upper rail or pressed into overhead gap supply.
hypotheses.title: Bottom-channel gap-highway long

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reopen only if exhausted parents show better forward expectancy than fresh parents over at least 30 samples.
hypotheses.mechanism: Each rejection/reload consumes resting buyer liquidity; after enough tests the shelf stops being protection and becomes a failure point.
hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
hypotheses.promotion_target: NO_TRADE evidence rule; never promote directly to bot.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Tag fresh_tests >= 5 or rejection_count_since_parent >= 5 as MUSTARD_EXHAUSTED and compare avoided outcomes against fresh reload outcomes.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: Parent shelves with repeated retests are liquidity-consumed and should remain track-only or no-trade.
hypotheses.title: Mustard X exhausted parent avoid

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Do not promote if the first 30 forward shadow candidates fail to keep high capture and positive realized/ghost expectancy.
hypotheses.mechanism: A deep shelf stack means multiple buyer-memory layers are close enough to defend price, but the same layered inventory tends to produce grind behavior instead of explosive expansion.
hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
hypotheses.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL -> BOT_CANDIDATE only after 30 forward samples, positive expectancy, and 100% spine attribution.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Shadow every fresh reload with fresh_tests <= 1 and support_stack_depth >= 4 as MUSTARD_GRIND_LONG; score fixed-target capture, realized R, giveback, options agreement, and parent-gap breach.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: Fresh parent-gap reloads with support_stack_depth >= 4 are high-capture income trades, not runners.
hypotheses.title: Mustard X fresh deep-stack grind

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Do not promote if the first 20 forward shadow candidates fail to prove realized runner R after partials/trailing, regardless of max favorable R.
hypotheses.mechanism: A lone high-genesis parent has less nearby overhead child inventory, so if buyers defend the parent shelf, price has room to expand instead of grinding through stacked supply.
hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
hypotheses.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL -> BOT_CANDIDATE only after 20 forward runner samples, realized positive R, and 100% spine attribution.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Shadow every fresh reload with fresh_tests <= 1 and support_stack_depth == 1 as MUSTARD_RUNNER_LONG; score partial-at-2R, partial-at-3R, trailing remainder, max favorable R, and realized giveback.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: Fresh parent-gap reloads with support_stack_depth == 1 are rare asymmetric runners; capped targets discard the edge.
hypotheses.title: Mustard X fresh lone-parent runner

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Retire if options agreement fails to improve avg R over gap-only picks after 30 clean shadow samples.
hypotheses.mechanism: Structural price memory identifies where auction inventory may reload; options open interest and IV pressure may identify where hedging/pin flows slow or accelerate the move.
hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
hypotheses.promotion_target: RESEARCH_NOTE -> SHADOW_PANEL after options context is non-null and freshness is contract-validated.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Shadow-score every options-aware pick with highway_agreement: aligned, conflicted, or unknown; do not trade the options signal alone.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: A long has higher follow-through when gap/channel room and options pressure agree, and lower follow-through when options pin/call-wall pressure sits directly in the gap highway.
hypotheses.title: Options and gaps clear-highway agreement

evidence.reason: EXPERIMENT_ONLY day; weak evidence can be reviewed for deletion/demotion, not normal learning

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Delete if no narrower mechanism can be specified in one sentence and tested with clean context.
hypotheses.mechanism: Negative edge with enough samples is usually a spec problem, gate problem, or panel trying to trade the wrong location/regime.
hypotheses.next_action: Review for deletion, demotion, or a smaller shadow-only variant.
hypotheses.promotion_target: RETIRED or narrowed SHADOW_PANEL.

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reopen if future certified/ghost evidence flips positive with enough samples.
hypotheses.mechanism: Negative ghost R says the avoided trades were mostly bad; the edge may be in respecting the rejection reason.
hypotheses.next_action: Keep the gate. Only test a narrow exception if a human can name the mechanism.
hypotheses.promotion_target: No promotion; this is a defensive rule hypothesis.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Preserve GAP_REJECT_DISABLED; optionally search for a tiny exception class instead of broad loosening.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: Skip group GAP_REJECT_DISABLED appears to be protecting P/L and should not be loosened without a stricter subcase.

learning_rules.promotion_path: Hypothesis -> experiment admission -> shadow/paper evidence -> daily certification -> promotion gate -> human approval.

operator_read: AI learning produced 27 research hypotheses; none can affect the bot without admission and certified forward evidence.

top_queue.kill_criteria: Retire if runner opportunity lost exceeds protected drawdown after 30 closed trades.
top_queue.mechanism: Early auction edges decay when first-hour trend fails, while true runners should keep making higher lows or hold above VWAP/opening range.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL only; never modify live exits without exit-intent trace proof.
top_queue.proposed_experiment: Shadow-grade an exit overlay that banks partial gains after first-hour failure, but leaves a runner only when opening-range/VWAP structure remains intact.
top_queue.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
top_queue.thesis: The bot often gives back early gains; a session-aware exit rule may preserve small daily wins without killing true runners.
top_queue.title: Morning profit decay guard

top_queue.kill_criteria: Retire or tighten if 20 shadow picks produce avg ghost R <= 0, or if top-channel collisions outperform lower-location picks.
top_queue.mechanism: Auction location creates asymmetric inventory: lower-rail buyers can reload against nearby invalidation while overhead gap supply is still far enough away to offer a clean reward path.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL -> BOT_CANDIDATE only after 3 separate days and at least 20 clean ghost picks.
top_queue.proposed_experiment: Emit a shadow pick only when channel_percentile <= 35, room_to_gap_above_r >= 1.5, nearest_gap_above_distance_pct is not immediate, and nearest_gap_below or lower rail defines a tight invalidation.
top_queue.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
top_queue.thesis: Longs work better when price is near the lower channel rail with clean room to the next overhead gap, and fail more often when entry is already near the upper rail or pressed into overhead gap supply.
top_queue.title: Bottom-channel gap-highway long

top_queue.kill_criteria: Reopen only if exhausted parents show better forward expectancy than fresh parents over at least 30 samples.
top_queue.mechanism: Each rejection/reload consumes resting buyer liquidity; after enough tests the shelf stops being protection and becomes a failure point.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.promotion_target: NO_TRADE evidence rule; never promote directly to bot.
top_queue.proposed_experiment: Tag fresh_tests >= 5 or rejection_count_since_parent >= 5 as MUSTARD_EXHAUSTED and compare avoided outcomes against fresh reload outcomes.
top_queue.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
top_queue.thesis: Parent shelves with repeated retests are liquidity-consumed and should remain track-only or no-trade.
top_queue.title: Mustard X exhausted parent avoid

top_queue.kill_criteria: Do not promote if the first 30 forward shadow candidates fail to keep high capture and positive realized/ghost expectancy.
top_queue.mechanism: A deep shelf stack means multiple buyer-memory layers are close enough to defend price, but the same layered inventory tends to produce grind behavior instead of explosive expansion.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL -> BOT_CANDIDATE only after 30 forward samples, positive expectancy, and 100% spine attribution.
top_queue.proposed_experiment: Shadow every fresh reload with fresh_tests <= 1 and support_stack_depth >= 4 as MUSTARD_GRIND_LONG; score fixed-target capture, realized R, giveback, options agreement, and parent-gap breach.
top_queue.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
top_queue.thesis: Fresh parent-gap reloads with support_stack_depth >= 4 are high-capture income trades, not runners.
top_queue.title: Mustard X fresh deep-stack grind

top_queue.kill_criteria: Do not promote if the first 20 forward shadow candidates fail to prove realized runner R after partials/trailing, regardless of max favorable R.
top_queue.mechanism: A lone high-genesis parent has less nearby overhead child inventory, so if buyers defend the parent shelf, price has room to expand instead of grinding through stacked supply.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL -> BOT_CANDIDATE only after 20 forward runner samples, realized positive R, and 100% spine attribution.
top_queue.proposed_experiment: Shadow every fresh reload with fresh_tests <= 1 and support_stack_depth == 1 as MUSTARD_RUNNER_LONG; score partial-at-2R, partial-at-3R, trailing remainder, max favorable R, and realized giveback.
top_queue.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
top_queue.thesis: Fresh parent-gap reloads with support_stack_depth == 1 are rare asymmetric runners; capped targets discard the edge.
top_queue.title: Mustard X fresh lone-parent runner
